actionsJson.summary: Replace the empty workspace with a verified pyvisa flow that configures B1 for CAN FD error-frame search using SEARCH1.
findings: B1 signal source, threshold, and CAN FD bit-rate were not changed because exact verified commands for those settings were not fully available in this turn's source-of-truth results.
suggestedFixes: If B1 is not already fully decoded, complete its source/threshold/bit-rate setup manually before running the search.
Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: CAN FD Error Frame Search on B1
flow.description: Configures B1 for CAN FD, enables bus display, and sets SEARCH1 to find CAN error frames on B1.

params.text: Verified portions only: if B1 is not already fully configured, manually complete its bus source, threshold, and CAN FD bit-rate settings before using this search flow.

params.command: BUS:B1:TYPe CAN; BUS:B1:CAN:STANDard FDNONISO; DISplay:WAVEView1:BUS:B1:STATE ON
